careGap.heading: The care gap
careGap.intro: Current pet services are often transactional and disconnected. We’re solving the "loneliness of pet ownership" by building a reliable, heartbeat-driven network.
careGap.timeBody: of pet owners say their busy schedules prevent them from giving their pets enough midday interaction.
careGap.socialBody: of dogs don’t get enough regular socialization with new people and environments outside their home.
careGap.trustBody: owners feel "guilty" using corporate apps where care feels like just another "gig" to the provider.

why.heading: So… why PawTaker?
why.intro: Because pet care should feel like a neighbourly hand, not a corporate transaction. We are building a village where trust is the foundation and every pet is treated like family.
why.kindnessBody: Every walk or playdate earns you points. Use your points whenever you need a hand with your own pet. No payments, no fees, just pet lovers helping pet lovers keep tails wagging. Just reciprocity.
why.freedomBody: Care on your schedule. Need a midday walk, overnight care or a weekend stay? Browse local "Takers" and find the perfect match. Manage every detail in one clean, simple space.
why.trustTitle: The trust: safe stays, shared hearts
why.trustBody: We’re building a verified network of real pet lovers. With mutual agreements and community ratings, you can rest easy knowing they’re in safe hands. Illustration: Two different pets (maybe a bird and a dog) sharing a single oversized scarf or heart.

benefits.heading: Why PawTaker?
benefits.subtitle: Our community is built on trust and a shared love for animals, making pet care accessible for everyone.

trust.title: Built on trust
trust.body: Verified members and community ratings help ensure your pet is always in safe hands.

simplicity.title: Complete simplicity
simplicity.body: Request or offer care with a few taps. No complicated payments or subscriptions.

petFirst.title: Pet-first approach
petFirst.body: Every decision is focused on your pet’s comfort, safety, and happiness.

cta.subtitle: Start sharing the joy of pet care with your neighbours today. It takes less than 2 minutes to get started.

cta.subtitleLine2: It takes less than 2 minutes to get started.

featuresOld.heading: Why PawTaker?
featuresOld.subtitle: A community-first platform built on trust, transparency, and care.

zeroCost.title: Zero cost
zeroCost.body: No money changes hands. Use points to give and receive care — it's a fair exchange for everyone.

verified.title: Verified members
verified.body: Every sitter is ID-verified before they can offer care, so you always know who's with your pet.

safety.title: Real-time updates
safety.body: Get photo check-ins and messages while your pet is being looked after.

takers.heading: Meet our takers
takers.subtitle: Verified community members ready to care for your pet.

appPreview.heading: Give care. Get care.
appPreview.subtitle: Ask for help when you need it. Offer care to build your reputation.

messages.body: "Thanks for the help! Check-in looks great."

checkins.title: Care update sent
checkins.body: Walk done. See you next time!

footer.description: Making pet care social, affordable, and safe for every animal lover across the globe.

about.heroSubtitle: Because every pet deserves a village of love and care, no matter where life takes you.
about.heading: Our story
about.mission: PawTaker was born from a simple belief: pet care should be built on community, not commerce. We connect pet owners with trusted neighbours who are passionate about animals.
about.pointsOverProfit: By replacing money with points, we remove financial barriers and create a genuine exchange of care. Every member both gives and receives — that's what makes PawTaker different.
about.missionBody: We make quality pet care accessible through our unique Community Points system. By helping others in the community, you earn credits that can be used for your own pet's care.

give.title: Give love
give.body: Provide walks, feeding, or sitting for pets in your neighbourhood.

earn.title: Earn points
earn.body: Accumulate points for every minute you spend caring for furry friends.

receive.title: Receive care
receive.body: Redeem points when you need someone to look after your own pet.

safety.title: Uncompromising safety
safety.body: Every member undergoes thorough checks and identity verification because peace of mind is priceless.

trust.title: Mutual trust
trust.body: Our community is built on transparency, honest reviews, and the shared responsibility of caring for each other's companions.

love.title: Deep love for animals
love.body: Beyond just logic, we are driven by the connection between humans and their animals. We lead with heart.

cta.heading: Ready to find your village?
cta.subtitle: Join pet owners who are swapping stories, walks, and care in our growing community.

steps.heading: How PawTaker works
steps.subtitle: Four simple steps to safe, community-powered pet care.

join.title: Create your profile
join.body: Sign up, complete KYC verification, and set up your pet or taker profile in minutes.

postOrTake.title: Post a request or offer care
postOrTake.body: Owners post care requests; takers apply. Browse listings and connect with the right match.

earnPoints.title: Exchange points
earnPoints.body: No cash — just points. Give care to earn them, spend them when you need help.

peaceOfMind.title: Stay informed
peaceOfMind.body: Receive real-time check-in photos and messages throughout the care session.

faq.heading: Why the community loves PawTaker
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

kyc.question: Why do I need to verify my identity?
kyc.answer: KYC verification ensures every member of the community is who they say they are, keeping pets and owners safe.

points.question: How do points work?
points.answer: You earn points by providing care and spend them when you need care for your own pets. There is no cash involved.

emergencies.question: What happens in an emergency?
emergencies.answer: Takers are expected to contact the owner immediately and follow the care instructions provided. Our support team is available around the clock.

cta.heading: Ready to join the pack?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of pet lovers today. Sign up and get your first 5 PawPoints free to start your journey.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.section1Body: By accessing or using PawTaker ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.
terms.section2Body: PawTaker is a community-based pet care platform where users create profiles, share their location and availability, and exchange pet care using a points system. Users can also add pet profiles that include pet image, name, and age. We do not process payments; care is exchanged on a non-monetary, points-based basis.
terms.section3Body: You must be 18 years of age or older and able to form a binding contract. You must complete identity verification (KYC) before offering or requesting care. You are responsible for ensuring your account details are accurate and your use of the Platform complies with local laws.
terms.section4Body: Points have no cash value and cannot be exchanged for money. You must not abuse the system, harass other users, or misrepresent yourself or your pets. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or our community guidelines.
terms.section5Body: PawTaker is provided "as is." We are not liable for any harm to users, pets, or property arising from arrangements made through the Platform. Pet care is arranged directly between users; we do not employ or guarantee sitters.
terms.section6Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via the app or email where possible.
terms.section7Body: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at the support address provided in the app or on our website.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide when you sign up, including your name, email, password, location, and availability. If you add pets, we collect pet profile data including pet image, pet name, and pet age. We also collect care-request content, messages you send through the Platform, and identity verification (KYC) documents to maintain a trusted community.
privacy.section2Body: We use your information to operate the Platform, manage your account, match you with other users based on location and availability, process KYC, enforce our terms, and send service-related communications. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section3Body: Your profile details needed for matching (such as name, general location, availability, and pet profile information) may be visible to other verified users to facilitate care arrangements. We may share data with service providers (e.g. hosting, analytics) under strict agreements. We may disclose information when required by law.
privacy.section4Body: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data. Identity documents and sensitive data are stored securely and used only for verification and safety purposes.
privacy.section5Body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your data, and to object to or restrict certain processing. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.section6Body: We use cookies and similar technologies for authentication, preferences, and analytics on our website and in our apps, in line with this policy.
privacy.section7Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via the Platform or email where appropriate.
privacy.section8Body: For privacy-related questions or requests, contact us at the support address provided in the app or on our website.
